## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Test update
- [ ] CI/config change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `pytest -m unit -q`
- [ ] Relevant marker groups for changed behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated when needed
